class.description: Sampling-based RRT* global planner. Grows a collision-free tree over the global costmap with goal-biased sampling and neighbourhood rewiring, and returns the best start-to-goal path. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.

Bidirectional sampling-based RRT-Connect global planner. Grows trees from both the start and the goal over the global costmap and greedily connects them, threading narrow passages faster than plain RRT/RRT* (feasible, not optimal). Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if no path is found.
